title: Yellowstoned
description: Aims to add the natural wonders of the North American wilderness.
body:
![yellowstoned logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34272947167e7e567d0bcd5947158e19b2bf958e.png)
### This mod aims to add features inspired by the North American wilderness. Many of the features are contained within mobs, with each having their own unique purpose to give. The mod also comes with a built in tutorial book that teaches the player about the features of the mod as they encounter them.

**All images contained modded terrain from the mod Terralith, and are taken with Complementary Shaders on.**
![4 images stacked on top of each other, displaying info on the bison, moose, reindeer, and beaver mob, the info is displayed in book pages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22d28749d9e37d0aa1b99c72986dcd431ead6259.jpeg) # What I Want To Add Next - Black Bear - Squirrel - Geyser Block
Join the Discord for future updates! [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/wavgdykkhQ)
